name: Oats Upma
tagline: Savoury rolled-oats upma — beta-glucan, fiber, ready in 15 min

hero.alt: Savoury oats upma with chopped onion, peas, carrots, and curry leaves
hero.caption: oats upma — south-style with vegetables

steps.title: Dry-roast the oats
steps.detail: Heat a dry pan, add oats, roast on medium-low for 4 minutes until they smell toasty. Set aside.
steps.tip: Toasted oats stay distinct in the upma instead of going slushy.

steps.title: Tadka and vegetables
steps.detail: Heat ghee in the same pan. Crackle mustard seeds, urad dal, curry leaves, green chili. Add onion, sauté 1 minute. Toss in carrot and peas, cook 2 minutes.
steps.tip: Frozen peas work fine — drop them in straight, they'll thaw in seconds.

steps.title: Combine and finish
steps.detail: Pour in 1.75 cups hot water and salt. Once it boils, sprinkle in roasted oats, stir, lower heat, cover for 2 minutes. Off heat. Squeeze lemon, stir, serve.
steps.tip: Eat immediately — oats upma firms up as it cools.

healthFacts: Beta-glucan in oats lowers LDL cholesterol by 5–10% in 6 weeks of daily consumption.
Soluble fiber blunts post-meal glucose spikes — supports HbA1c control.
Magnesium and manganese content support insulin sensitivity.
More protein and less starch than rava upma — better for blood sugar.
